MICHAEL BERG PRO TEMP, L.NAJERA/CSR, K.LEE/CLERK 02:48PM CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. DOMINIC BALDINI FOR THE PLTF AND THE DEFT LIGIA OROZCO IN PRO PER. EMMA OROZCO AS A SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR THE DEFENDANT. THE CASE IS SETTLED. TERMS ON THE RECORD.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OROZCO, LIGIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 118 SADOWA STREET, S.F. $2,291.30 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,291.30, STAYED UNTIL DEC-26-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, AT 12PM, IF DEFT VACATES THE PREMISES AND AGREES TO ALL OF THE STIPULATIONS, THEN THE PLTF SHALL VACATE THE JUDGMENT AND WAIVE ALL BACK RENTS AND DISMISS THE CASE. SEE THE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
